schemaRef: Epic #1871 AC7 — adversarial corpus for anneal-decision-detector

categories.true_positive: Recognition followed by NO decision — detector MUST flag (ok=false)
categories.true_negative: Recognition followed by valid decision — detector MUST pass (ok=true)
categories.false_positive_trap: Phrases that LOOK like recognition but are not (research analysis, neutral usage) — detector tolerable false-positive on these
